title: Windows Update Cache Corruption
symptoms: Updates fail to install with error codes like 0x80070002.
root_cause_analysis: Corrupted files in the SoftwareDistribution cache prevent update processing.

title: Linux Package Manager Cache Overflow
symptoms: APT/YUM operations fail due to disk space exhaustion.
root_cause_analysis: Old package files accumulate in /var/cache/apt or /var/cache/yum.

title: Application Cache Causing Performance Lag
symptoms: IDE or browser runs sluggishly after prolonged use.
root_cause_analysis: Excessive cached files in application directories consume resources.

title: Thumbnail Cache Bloat
symptoms: Explorer or file manager loads slowly when browsing directories.
root_cause_analysis: Thumbnail cache database grows excessively with repeated file previews.

title: DNS Resolver Cache Stale Records
symptoms: Hosts resolve to incorrect IP addresses.
root_cause_analysis: Local DNS cache retains outdated entries.

title: GPU Shader Cache Corruption
symptoms: Games or 3D apps crash or fail to render properly.
root_cause_analysis: Corrupted shader cache files in GPU driver directories.

title: Web Proxy Cache Serving Stale Content
symptoms: Users receive outdated web pages despite updates.
root_cause_analysis: Proxy cache fails to refresh content due to misconfigured TTL.

title: Build Tool Cache Overflow
symptoms: CI/CD pipelines fail due to disk exhaustion.
resolution_steps: Run 'npm cache clean --force' or 'pip cache purge'.

title: Font Cache Corruption
symptoms: Applications crash or fail to render text correctly.
root_cause_analysis: Corrupted font cache files prevent proper rendering.

title: Browser Cache Causing Login Failures
symptoms: Users cannot log into web apps despite correct credentials.
root_cause_analysis: Corrupted cookies or cached session data block authentication.
